name: go-pretty-preview
description: Read-only rendered preview for Go files with improved readability

commands.title: Go Preview: Open Preview to Side

goPreview.openByDefault.description: Automatically open the Go preview panel when a Go file is activated

goPreview.rules.inlineOneLineIf.description: Inline one-line if/else-if/else blocks onto a single line

goPreview.rules.fadePackages.description: Package names whose qualifier (e.g. fmt.) is rendered dimmed in the preview. Example: ["fmt", "sync", "context"]

enumDescriptions: No change — log lines are shown as-is
Dim log lines (grayscale + low opacity) so the eye skips over them
Remove log lines from the preview entirely (enables inline-if for single-body blocks)
Highlight log lines to see logging coverage at a glance
goPreview.rules.logVisibility.description: How slog.* logging calls are rendered in the preview
